summary: E-Signature feature testing completed. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: E-signature API endpoints were not registered because routes were defined after app.include_router() call. Moved e-signature routes before include_router. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 5 features verified working via Playwright.
passed_tests: FEATURE 1: E-Signatures page loads at /e-signatures for logged-in managers - PASS
FEATURE 2: Upload Template dialog opens when clicking 'Upload Template' button - PASS
FEATURE 3: Templates tab shows uploaded templates (and no templates when empty) - PASS
FEATURE 4: Send for Signature dialog opens when clicking 'Send for Signature' button - PASS
FEATURE 5: Public signing page at /sign/:token loads document details - PASS
Backend: POST /api/esign/templates uploads PDF template successfully
Backend: POST /api/esign/send sends document for signature
Backend: POST /api/esign/sign/:token signs document with signature image
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL BUG FIXED: E-signature routes were defined after app.include_router(api_router) at line 7200, causing all esign endpoints to return 404. Moved the entire e-signature section (lines 7317-7653) to before the include_router call.
Also fixed create_notification call in sign_document function - it was using wrong parameter order (4 params vs 7 expected)
E-signature feature implementation is comprehensive: template upload, document sending, public signing page, PDF overlay with signature and timestamp
seed_data_used: Test documents created via API tests - automatically cleaned up

feature_verification_summary.feature_1_esignatures_page: PASS - Page loads with title 'E-Signatures', Upload Template and Send for Signature buttons visible
feature_verification_summary.feature_2_upload_template_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with Template Name input and PDF file chooser
feature_verification_summary.feature_3_templates_tab: PASS - Templates tab shows count and template cards with Use Template button
feature_verification_summary.feature_4_send_signature_dialog: PASS - Dialog opens with Document Template dropdown, Document Name, Signer Name and Email fields
feature_verification_summary.feature_5_public_signing_page: PASS - Shows document name, sender info, date, signer info, document preview, signature pad, agreement checkbox

bug_fixed.issue: All e-signature API endpoints returning 404 Not Found
bug_fixed.root_cause: E-signature routes were defined after app.include_router(api_router) at line 7200 in server.py. FastAPI had already registered all routes when include_router was called, so the e-signature routes added later were never registered.
bug_fixed.fix: Moved the e-signature code section (routes and models) to before the include_router call, ensuring all routes are defined before registration.

context_for_next_testing_agent: E-signature feature is fully working. The critical bug where esign endpoints returned 404 has been fixed by moving the route definitions before app.include_router(). Backend restart applied. Test manager account: manager@test.mypropops.com / TestManager2026!. Public signing page works at /sign/:token with signature pad using react-signature-canvas.
